raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van Service in Epsom

Just as efficient as our removals service, a man and van is perfect for smaller domestic or commercial moves!

How can we help you today?

Professional Man and Van in Epsom

Experienced and Efficient

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving and Storage, we understand that no two moves are the same. Not every move requires a huge fleet of vans and an entire team. That is why we came up with a solution for those smaller moves whether they are domestic or commercial - our man van services. This is a perfect solution for flat, small house removals or office removals. Every move has different requirements, so we work flexibly around your schedule. We are available 7 days a week and there is no additional charge for weekends.

First-Rate Service at Affordable Prices

We prioritise providing dependable and professional service at affordable prices. We have fully qualified and trained team members but we still keep prices low as we understand moving can be expensive without paying out a huge amount for removals. We have built a fantastic reputation in the local area through providing impeccable service every time. We always provide suitable safety equipment to keep all of your belongings secure during their journey, like tie rails, furniture covers, loading ramps and sack trucks. You will have a designated removal man who will be familiar with Epsom and able to reach your new location quickly, without any disruptions.

Man and Van Hire Rates

To make things simple we offer two different pricing options: 

  • ‍Man with Van and working driver - £70 per hour
  • ‍Man with A Van and driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All of the prices above are inclusive of vat and fuel (within a local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend moving.

More Than Just Removal Services

We offer additional services to our man and van removals because we know that it's not all about moving day and transporting your belongings. We offer a packing service where we will delicately and efficiently pack all of your belongings. If you decide you would rather pack yourself, we offer flat pack moving boxes and other high quality packing supplies at low-cost prices which can be collected from our shop. Not only this, we offer accessible self-storage units, which may be necessary for when you need to ensure your belongings are safe in between moves. They are large, secure, clean and available to rent at just £30 (plus VAT) per week which is brilliant value for money.

Contact Us

For a free, no obligation quote for small removals Epsom, please contact our friendly team today on 01323 848 008 or fill out the online form by clicking the button at the top of this page.
